danger_signals.visual_form: Dark, gothic architecture and interior design
danger_signals.meaning: Hostile or dangerous location; progression into mystery/threat zone

danger_signals.visual_form: Volcanic landscape with lava and heat hazards
danger_signals.meaning: Extreme environmental danger; sacrificial/death threat narrative context
Supernatural danger; final quest stage before revelation

danger_signals.visual_form: Dark mystical fortress with magical aesthetic
danger_signals.meaning: Final boss threat; source of conflict; antagonist stronghold

danger_signals.visual_form: Hostile creatures/characters appearing in level geometry
danger_signals.meaning: Active threat requiring evasion or combat response

safety_signals.meaning: Allied faction location; safe zone after trust earned

safety_signals.visual_form: Character visual change to ninja garb/form
safety_signals.meaning: Power-up state; readiness for combat challenges

safety_signals.visual_form: Collectible items (red or white tokens depending on version)
safety_signals.meaning: Resource availability; transformation capability; progression readiness

safety_signals.visual_form: Bright, open island landscape with natural features
safety_signals.meaning: Starting safe area; detective context; investigation beginning

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Initially hostile (volcano sacrifice scenario); become allies after 'test of duckhood'
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Native village architecture; tropical island setting; ancient temples and burial sites

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Witch doctor as primary antagonist; magical/supernatural enemy types
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Mojo Stronghold fortress; dark mystical environments; underworld/spiritual locations

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Detective identity (Maui) vs. Ninja identity (Cold Shadow)
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Dual form system: Maui (insect-launcher pistol user) vs. Cold Shadow (bo staff ninja)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Can navigate both civilian spaces and ninja challenge areas; progression through contrasting environments

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Tropical island in stable state; Shabuhm Shabuhm idol present but missing (creates narrative tension)
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Maui operates as detective in civilian form; natives function normally until idol absence becomes critical

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Progression through creepy mansion and ancient grounds; environmental hazards increase; mystical/supernatural elements emerge
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Maui gains transformation ability; combat becomes necessary; environmental puzzles require both forms

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Volcano sacrifice scenario; hostile native behavior in visual context
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Maui forced through life-or-death trials; natives appear as temporary antagonists

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Village environment becomes more welcoming; natives visually interact as allies rather than threats
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Natives provide information; Maui can move through village without combat pressure; dialogue/exposition increases

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Land of the dead aesthetic; supernatural/ghostly visual style; final fortress approaches
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Mojo Stronghold enemies increase; combat intensity peaks; mystical hazards replace natural ones

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Island narrative closure; community celebration implied through ending dialogue
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Islanders name island 'Mallard' in gratitude; world returns to stable (albeit post-adventure) state

environmental_storytelling.example: Mansion → Ninja grounds → Village → Volcano → Underworld → Stronghold creates story arc through environment sequence
Volcano sacrifice and lava hazards visually communicate the existential threat to the island
Ninja grounds require/unlock Cold Shadow transformation; subsequent levels enforce Maui-only sections (bungee vine jumping) to maintain dual-form mechanic meaning
Shabuhm Shabuhm idol drives entire plot; its absence frames investigation; its recovery anchors finale
Native village transitions from hostile (sacrifice threat) to allied (information-giving) through environmental context shift
Witch doctor territory uses mystical/magical visual language distinct from natural island or civilized areas

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Unarmed exploration; insect-launcher for ranged defense; slower, methodical movement; detective-mode problem-solving with environmental interaction
Bo staff short-range combat; climbing and traversal abilities (narrow tunnels); strength scales with ninja token count; chained attack combos (SNES version)
Hostile interaction; volcano sacrifice scenario; block progression until 'test of duckhood' passed
Provide guidance; share critical information about idol location; peaceful coexistence in village; narrative exposition
Stealth antagonist (not directly encountered until finale); steals idol; commands Mojo Stronghold; represents mystical threat
Spawn in level geometry; attack on sight; defeated via Maui's insect launcher or Cold Shadow's staff; force form-switching decisions
Enable transformation (Maui → Cold Shadow); amount collected determines Cold Shadow power level (SNES) or transformation cost (Genesis)

notes: Maui Mallard uses dual-form mechanics as core manifestation system: Maui (detective/civilian) represents investigation and resource gathering; Cold Shadow (ninja) represents combat readiness and narrative power progression. Visual transformation serves both mechanical and narrative purpose—communication of readiness state. World progresses from tropical mystery (bright, natural) through supernatural/underworld (dark, mystical), creating visual language matching narrative escalation. Native faction relationship shows explicit trust-progression through environment and behavior change, making political situation visible through npc demeanor and accessibility. Platform level design constraints (e.g., bungee vine requires Maui form) enforce form-switching as both mechanical puzzle and world-state communication. Idol as MacGuffin provides consistent visual/narrative anchor across all environments.
